title: animated axolotl
body:
### this pack adds a subtle animation making the axolotl in the bucket look more alive 

the animation added is meant to be simple and not distracting

![preview of the other variants ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/034d4df39b7e55a1d509a53d68238d168686df76.gif)

_cit respawn may be need for this pack to run correctly in the future.

shout-out to roundaround for making such a cool mod and for Blazified for making the original textures 

you can find both of them in the links below 

[Blazified on Planet Minecraft](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/colored-axolotl-buckets-with-babies/)

[roundaround's mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/axolotl-buckets)
